data.title: Announcement regarding the publication of the Consolidated audited annual information for 2025
data.description: A company known as AUGA Group, AB with the restructuring in process, identified with the code 126264360 and located at Konstitucijos ave. 21C in Vilnius, has disclosed in the 2026 investor calendar their intention to release the Consolidated audited annual information for the year 2025 on April 8, 2026. They also intended to share details about calling the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders and its agenda. Regrettably, the scheduled date for the publication of the Consolidated audited annual information for the 2025 financial year will not be met as originally planned.

data.title: Convocation of the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting of INVL Technology and draft resolutions on agenda issue
data.description: INVL Technology, a private equity investment company with the legal entity code 300893533 and registered address at Gyneju str. 14 Vilnius, Lithuania, announces that the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting will take place on 30 April 2026. This decision was made by the management company UAB „INVL Asset Management“.

data.title: Silex Technology and Edge Impulse Announce Collaboration to Accelerate Industrial and Medical Edge AI
data.description: In Santa Ana, California on April 8, 2026, a collaboration was revealed between Silex Technology, recognized worldwide for embedded wireless connectivity and edge computing solutions, and Edge Impulse, a Qualcomm company known for its cutting-edge AI MLOps development platform. This partnership aims to facilitate advanced edge technology.

data.title: MetaMetrics and Edmentum Announce Partnership to Connect Reading and Math Skills to Career Readiness
data.description: Edmentum's MajorClarity will become the pioneer in career exploration platforms by incorporating Lexile and Quantile measures on a national scale. This integration will assist students in connecting their reading and math progress to practical objectives across various careers. The partnership between Durham, N.C. and Bloomington, Minn. in this initiative is set to impact hundreds of career paths positively. The development was announced on April 8, 2026, through a PR Newswire release.
DELTA AIRLINES CEO STATES STRONG DEMAND EXISTS THROUGHOUT BOOKINGS, REGIONS, AND SERVICES.
DELTA AIRLINES CEO REPORTED THAT CASH SALES HAVE INCREASED BY DOUBLE DIGITS LAST MONTH, SIGNALING STRONG DEMAND.

data.title: SPX Technologies to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: SPX Technologies, Inc. made public that it is scheduled to disclose its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2026 following the closure of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The organization, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SPXC, shared this information on April 8, 2026, from Charlotte, North Carolina.

data.title: Burst Analytics to Launch Road Pact on Platform Science Virtual Vehicle Marketplace
data.description: A new partnership has been announced in Omaha, Nebraska, where Road Pact by Burst Analytics has launched on Platform Science's Virtual Vehicle Marketplace. This collaboration aims to provide fleets with AI-driven driver sentiment insights to enhance driver retention.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield Markets Iconic Domino Sugar Refinery Site in New York City
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield, a global real estate services firm, has been chosen by American Sugar Refining to exclusively handle the sale of The Refinery District in Yonkers, New York. The 33-acre waterfront development site, situated at 1 Federal Street, is the last significant development opportunity along the Yonkers waterfront. This property, previously housing the Domino Sugar Refinery, boasts over 2,300 linear feet of direct frontage.

data.title: Flint Development Secures Approval for Major New Industrial Hub in Huron Township, MI
data.description: A commercial real estate development firm, Flint Development, has received local approval to begin construction on the Pinnacle Industrial Center in Huron Township, Michigan. This premier industrial development will be situated at the southwest corner of Pennsylvania Rd. & Wahrman Rd. Construction is scheduled to start this spring, and the project is expected to be completed in the first quarter of 2027. The Pinnacle Industrial Center is poised to be a significant addition to the area.
FOREIGN INVESTORS PULL $70.3 BLN FROM EMERGING STOCKS, BONDS IN MARCH IN BIGGEST OUTFLOWS IN SIX YEARS, IIF REPORT SHOWS
INVESTORS PULL $14.2 BLN FROM EMERGING MARKET DEBT IN MARCH, FIRST OUTFLOWS SINCE APRIL, IIF REPORT SHOWS

data.title: Industry recalibrates after steel tariff overhaul
data.description: Businesses are strategizing for the upcoming phase of their efforts to impact the steel tariff policies of the current administration under Trump.

data.title: White House eyes belt-tightening for DOL, NLRB
data.description: The White House is proposing significant budget cuts of billions for the Labor Department, which includes plans to reduce thousands of employees from its workforce and abolish sections of the agency that are unpopular among conservatives.

data.title: Genre-Bending Trailblazer Laufey to Receive ASCAP Creative Voice Award
data.description: Today in New York, the American Society of Composers, Authors, and Publishers (ASCAP) disclosed that Laufey, a musician known for winning two Grammy awards, will be presented with the prestigious ASCAP Creative Voice Award.

data.title: Republic Business Credit Adds Jerry Friedrichs as Senior Vice President to Strengthen Underwriting Excellence
data.description: Republic Business Credit has recently welcomed Jerry Friedrichs as their new Senior Vice President of Underwriting. With his wealth of experience and high-level knowledge, Friedrichs is set to enhance the specialty finance underwriting strategy of the company. This appointment comes as a strategic move to bolster the underwriting team and further solidify Republic Business Credit's position in the market. The company made the announcement on April 8, 2026, in New Orleans, signaling their commitment to growth and innovation in the finance sector.

data.title: MULU Launches as the First National Cottage Cheese Brand to Deliver the Highest Protein on the Market
data.description: With a unique blend of whey and casein, MULU offers 18 grams of complete protein per serving, surpassing the competitor's leading brand in the cottage cheese market by one-third. MULU boasts the highest protein density among national cottage cheese brands, providing customers with 18g of complete protein per serving.

data.title: Industrial Motor Market to Reach US$ 31.9 Billion by 2033 Driven by Energy Efficiency and Automation Trends - Persistence Market Research
data.description: In London on April 8, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide industrial motor market is experiencing consistent growth, with an anticipated value of approximately US$ 23.1 billion in 2026. Projections indicate that this market is on track to reach US$ 31.9 billion by 2033, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.7% in the upcoming years. data.title: Gastrointestinal Stent Market worth $0.82 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts significant growth in the Gastrointestinal Stent Market. From a value of approximately USD 0.62 billion in 2026, the market is expected to reach USD 0.82 billion by 2031, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.7%. The report includes insights from 480 market data Tables and 65 Figures spread across 500 pages.
